features.name: if block single statement with ternary condition
features.description: Code should include an if statement with a ternary expression as its condition, where the ternary is complex enough to trigger line splitting during code emission
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clk) begin if (cond ? long_expression_a : long_expression_b) $display("x"); end

features.name: begin/end wrapper requirement when single statement becomes multiple
features.description: Code should include an if block without begin/end that will become a two-statement block when a temporary variable is inserted during code generation

features.name: wire declaration inside always_ff block
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration inside an always_ff block, which results from temporary variable emission during long-line splitting
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clk) begin wire tmp = a ? b : c; end
